title: Crunchy Pasta with Resinous Flair
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish featuring crunchy elements and a resinous polish sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni according to package instructions.
In a small saucepan, combine the resinous and polish ingredients over low heat.
Stir the crunchy elements into the saucepan and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Reserve 2 tablespoons of pasta cooking water and then drain the rigatoni.
Add the cooked rigatoni to the saucepan and toss with the resinous polish sauce and crunchy elements.
If the sauce seems too thick, add a little of the reserved pasta cooking water.
Season with salt to taste and serve immediately.
Optional: top with grated Parmesan cheese or chopped fresh herbs for added flavor.
